creator: dbaker@FreeBSD.org
text:
This error is printed when you exceed kern.ipc.maxpipekva:
 
	Sep 15 14:35:14 royce kernel: kern.ipc.maxpipekva exceeded; see tuning(7)

	. . . but there is nothing in "man 7 tuning" to explain the problem/error/variable/setting.

Fix: 

Man page needs to explain what the setting is.
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
